creator: eduardo@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Mark Millard from comment #22)

Done, I've just sent to list a build with (almost) all options disabled.

Note: that list is what is presented on aarch64 arch.

After I have some run tests on that machine: x11/i3/firefox, we will have more clues about llvm deps and more info to make a minimal mesa-dri port.

Thanks
